sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94077" key="sidiwto/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σιδιωτόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94077.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">medicine prepared from</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σίδιον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
